notes.text: SmartFilterBar: DynamicDateRange is now handled correctly in Adapt Filters dialog
P13nConditionPanel: Condition operator combobox is now correctly filtered.
SmartLink: Enhance link text for FactSheet in navigation popover
ValueHelpDialog: interval fields controls state is now handled correctly
FilterBar: Dynamically added filters have proper visibility
FilterBar: ValueState in AdaptFilters dialog is now correct
FilterBar: Disabled filters are no longer enabled on Adapt Filters open
SmartFilterBar: UI adaptation for Adapt Filters now works with dropdowns
SmartFilterBar: getUIState SelectionVariant missing DefaultValues conditions
We've now added a change event handler on the HBox item's binding that re-evaluates dash visibility in SmartMultiInput
